title: Cirrus: Minor cleanup of dependencies and docs
body: :smile: Actually, just docs and task-dependency cleanup then removing a long-disused "optional" task.

:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #3259) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
Changes LGTM, but the merge bug has bit ya @cevich
Seems I'm my own worst enemy lol.  No worries, I'll need to rebase this again after other PRs of mine merge as well.
